name: Dock
description: Customize the dock appearance and behavior.

settings.label: Icon Size
settings.description: Set the size of dock icons

settings.label: Desktop Export Preset
settings.description: Quick presets for dock-to-desktop drag behavior

settings.label: Desktop Export Upward Distance
settings.description: Minimum upward drag distance before dock item exports to desktop

settings.label: Desktop Export Vertical Ratio
settings.description: How vertical the drag must be to trigger desktop export

settings.label: Desktop Export Max Horizontal Drift
settings.description: Maximum horizontal drift allowed during desktop export drag
